zh.Dalby, Leicestershire, England: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾高爾比
zh.Skye Isle, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir David Bethune於1460年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親John Bethune V of Belfour26歲，母親Marjory Boswell21歲。他於1485年5月18日與Janet Duddingston在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1500年被列為lord high treasurer of scotland。他去世於1521年之後在蘇格蘭費伏可希，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Dalby, Leicestershire, England: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾高爾比
zh-hans.Skye Isle, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir David Bethune于1460年出生在英国苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲John Bethune V of Belfour26岁，母亲Marjory Boswell21岁。他于1485年5月18日与Janet Duddingston在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1500年被列为lord high treasurer of scotland。他去世于1521年之后在苏格兰費伏可希，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir David Bethune was born in 1460, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Bethune V of Belfour, was 26 and his mother, Marjory Boswell, was 21. He married Janet Duddingston on 18 May 1485, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 8 daughters. In 1500, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as lord high treasurer of scotland. He died after 1521, in Creich, Fife, Scotland, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir David Bethune est né en 1460, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bethune V of Belfour, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Marjory Boswell, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Janet Duddingston le 18 mai 1485, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 8 filles. En 1500, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord high treasurer of scotland. Il est décédé après 1521, à Creich, Fife, Écosse, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir David Bethune 1460 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Bethune V of Belfour 26 und seine Mutter Marjory Boswell 21. Er hat am 18. Mai 1485 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Janet Duddingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1500, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord high treasurer of scotland aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1521 in Creich, Fife, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Bethune è nato il nel 1460 nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Bethune V of Belfour, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Marjory Boswell, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Janet Duddingston il 18 maggio 1485, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 8 figlie. Nel 1500, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord high treasurer of scotland. Morì dopo il 1521, nel Creich, Fife, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Bethuneが1460年にイギリススコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父John Bethune V of Belfourは26歳，母Marjory Boswellは21歳であった。1485年5月18日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでJanet Duddingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。1500年，40歳の時，職業はlord high treasurer of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1521年以後にスコットランドフィフクレイチで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Bethune(이)가 1460년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bethune V of Belfour(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Boswell(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1485년 5월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Janet Duddingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1500년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord high treasurer of scotland이었다. 그는 1521년 이후 스컷랜드 피프 크레이치에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Bethune nasceu em 1460, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Bethune V of Belfour, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Boswell, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Duddingston em 18 de maio de 1485, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 8 filhas. Em 1500, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord high treasurer of scotland. Ele faleceu após 1521, em Creich, Fife, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir David Bethune родился в 1460 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Bethune V of Belfour было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Boswell, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Duddingston 18 мая 1485 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 8 дочерей. В 1500 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии lord high treasurer of scotland. Он умер после 1521 г. в местности краич, фиф, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir David Bethune nació en 1460, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Bethune V of Belfour, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Marjory Boswell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Janet Duddingston el 18 de mayo de 1485, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 8 hijas. En 1500, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era lord high treasurer of scotland. Murió después de 1521, en Creich, Fife, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
